title: cacalia saxicola
intro: Cacalia saxicola, also known as the rock saxifrage, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Cacalia saxicola include tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
